helpful to resolve the issue:\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eResponse header - Please refer to \u003ccode\u003eResponse Metadata\u003c/code\u003e section for more details.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eHTTP status code\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eError code - Server's error code, e.g. \u003ccode\u003e-1102\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eError message - Server's error message, e.g. \u003ccode\u003eUnknown order sent.\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRequest config - Configuration send to the server, which can include URL, request method and headers.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"// client initialization is skipped\nclient.exchangeInfo({ symbol: 'invalidSymbol' })\n  .then(response =\u0026gt; client.logger.log(response.data))\n  .catch(err =\u0026gt; {\n    client.logger.error(err.response.headers) // full response header\n    client.logger.error(err.response.status) // HTTP status code 400\n    client.logger.error(err.response.data) // wsURL: \u0026quot;wss://fstream.binance.com\u0026quot;,\n});\n\n// Subscribe to the allMarketMiniTickersStream <p dir="auto"><strong>This repository is deprecated. Please use the new modular connector repository: <a href="https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js">binance-connector-js</a></strong></p>
<p dir="auto">This is a lightweight library that works as a connector to the UM and CM Binance Futures Endpoints. It’s designed to be simple, clean, and easy to use with minimal dependencies.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Supported APIs:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>/fapi/*</li>
<li>/dapi/*</li>
<li>UM Futures Websocket Market Stream</li>
<li>CM Futures Websocket Market Stream</li>
<li>UM Futures User Data Stream</li>
<li>CM Futures User Data Stream</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Inclusion of examples</li>
<li>Customisable base URL</li>
<li>Support request timeout and HTTP proxy</li>
<li>Response metadata can be displayed</li>
<li>Customisable Logger</li>
</ul>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">cmFuturesClient</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">CMFutures</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> UMFutures <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"@binance/futures-connector"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span> <span class="pl-c">// has no effect when RSA private key is provided</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">privateKeyPassphrase</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">"password"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">UMFutures</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  privateKey<span class="pl-kos">,</span>

<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">// Get account information</span>
<span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span>

  <span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">then</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">client</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

  <span class="pl-c1">baseURL</span>: <span class="pl-s">"https://testnet.binancefuture.com"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Base URL</h3><a id="user-content-base-url" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Base URL" href="#base-url"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If <code>baseURL</code> is not provided, it defaults to <code>fapi.binance.com</code>.</p>
<p dir="auto">It's recommended to pass in the <code>baseURL</code> parameter to the constructor, so that it can easily be replaced with the testnet baseURL for testing/debugging.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-s">``</span><span class="pl-s">`javascript</span>
<span class="pl-s"></span>
<span class="pl-s">### Optional Parameters</span>
<span class="pl-s"></span>
<span class="pl-s">Optional parameters are encapsulated to a single object as the last function parameter.</span>
<span class="pl-s"></span>
<span class="pl-s">`</span><span class="pl-s">``</span><span class="pl-kos"></span><span class="pl-s1">javascript</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> UMFutures <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">'@binance/futures-connector'</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">''</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">''</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">client</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">Spot</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>

<span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">getAccountInformation</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">recvWindow</span>: <span class="pl-c1">2000</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">then</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

```javascript

### Optional Parameters

Optional parameters are encapsulated to a single object as the last function parameter.

```javascript
const { UMFutures } = require('@binance/futures-connector')

const apiKey = ''
const apiSecret = ''
const client = new Spot(apiKey, apiSecret)

umFuturesClient.getAccountInformation({ recvWindow: 2000 }).then(response => umFuturesClient.logger.log(response.data))

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Timeout</h3><a id="user-content-timeout" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Timeout" href="#timeout"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">It's easy to set timeout in milliseconds in request. If the request take longer than timeout, the request will be aborted. If it's not set, there will be no timeout.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> UMFutures <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"@binance/futures-connector"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">UMFutures</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">timeout</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1000</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-s1">client</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">getAccountInformation</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Proxy</h3><a id="user-content-proxy" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Proxy" href="#proxy"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The <code>axios</code> package is used as the http client in this library. A proxy settings is passed into <code>axios</code> directly, the details can be found at <a href="https://github.com/axios/axios#request-config">here</a>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> UMFutures <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"@binance/futures-connector"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">UMFutures</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">apiKey</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">apiSecret</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">proxy</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">protocol</span>: <span class="pl-s">"https"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">host</span>: <span class="pl-s">"127.0.0.1"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">port</span>: <span class="pl-c1">9000</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">auth</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
      <span class="pl-c1">username</span>: <span class="pl-s">"proxy_user"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
      <span class="pl-c1">password</span>: <span class="pl-s">"password"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="const { UMFutures } = require("@binance/futures-connector");

const apiKey = "";
const apiSecret = "";
const umFuturesClient = new UMFutures(apiKey, apiSecret, {
  proxy: {
    protocol: "https",
    host: "127.0.0.1",
    port: 9000,
    auth: {
      username: "proxy_user",
      password: "password",
    },
  },
});" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">You may have a HTTP proxy, that can bring the problem that you need to make a HTTPS connection through the HTTP proxy. You can do that by build a HTTPS-over-HTTP tunnel by npm package <a href="https://www.npmjs.com/package/tunnel" rel="nofollow">tunnel</a>, and then pass the turnnel agent to <code>httpsAgent</code> in <code>axios</code>.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">tunnel</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"tunnel"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">agent</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">tunnel</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">httpsOverHttp</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">proxy</span>: <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">host</span>: <span class="pl-s">"127.0.0.1"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">port</span>: <span class="pl-c1">3128</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">UMFutures</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">null</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">baseURL</span>: <span class="pl-s">"https://fapi.binance.com"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">httpsAgent</span>: <span class="pl-s1">agent</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">getAccountInformation</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">then</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">catch</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">error</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">error</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">error</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="const tunnel = require("tunnel");

const agent = tunnel.httpsOverHttp({
  proxy: {
    host: "127.0.0.1",
    port: 3128,
  },
});

const umFuturesClient = new UMFutures(null, null, {
  baseURL: "https://fapi.binance.com",
  httpsAgent: agent,
});

umFuturesClient
  .getAccountInformation()
  .then((response) => umFuturesClient.logger.log(response.data))
  .catch((error) => umFuturesClient.logger.error(error));" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Custom Logger Integration</h3><a id="user-content-custom-logger-integration" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Custom Logger Integration" href="#custom-logger-integration"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> UMFutures <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"@binance/futures-connector"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">fs</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"fs"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> Console <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"console"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">// make sure the logs/ folder is created beforehand</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">output</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">fs</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">createWriteStream</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"./logs/stdout.log"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">errorOutput</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">fs</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">createWriteStream</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"./logs/stderr.log"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">logger</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">Console</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">stdout</span>: <span class="pl-s1">output</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">stderr</span>: <span class="pl-s1">errorOutput</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">UMFutures</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s">""</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">logger</span>: <span class="pl-s1">logger</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">getExchangeInfo</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">then</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">umFuturesClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">log</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-c">// check the output file</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="const { UMFutures } = require("@binance/futures-connector");
const fs = require("fs");
const { Console } = require("console");

// make sure the logs/ folder is created beforehand
const output = fs.createWriteStream("./logs/stdout.log");
const errorOutput = fs.createWriteStream("./logs/stderr.log");

const logger = new Console({ stdout: output, stderr: errorOutput });
const umFuturesClient = new UMFutures("", "", { logger: logger });

umFuturesClient
  .getExchangeInfo()
  .then((response) => umFuturesClient.logger.log(response.data));
// check the output file" tabindex="0" role="button">

    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
<p dir="auto">The default logger defined in the package is <a href="https://nodejs.org/api/console.html" rel="nofollow">Node.js Console class</a>. Its output is sent to <code>process.stdout</code> and <code>process.stderr</code>, same as the global console.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Error</h3><a id="user-content-error" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Error" href="#error"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">There are 2 types of error that may be returned from the API server and the user has to handle it properly:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><code>Client error</code></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>This is thrown when server returns <code>4XX</code>, it's an issue from client side.</li>
<li>The following properties may be helpful to resolve the issue:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Response header - Please refer to <code>Response Metadata</code> section for more details.</li>
<li>HTTP status code</li>
<li>Error code - Server's error code, e.g. <code>-1102</code></li>
<li>Error message - Server's error message, e.g. <code>Unknown order sent.</code></li>
<li>Request config - Configuration send to the server, which can include URL, request method and headers.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>// client initialization is skipped
client.exchangeInfo({ symbol: 'invalidSymbol' })
  .then(response => client.logger.log(response.data))
  .catch(err => {
    client.logger.error(err.response.headers) // full response header
    client.logger.error(err.response.status) // HTTP status code 400
    client.logger.error(err.response.data) // includes both error code and message
    client.logger.error(err.response.config) // includes request's config
  })

</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="// client initialization is skipped
client.exchangeInfo({ symbol: 'invalidSymbol' })
  .then(response => client.logger.log(response.data))
  .catch(err => {
    client.logger.error(err.response.headers) // full response header
    client.logger.error(err.response.status) // HTTP status code 400
    client.logger.error(err.response.data) // includes both error code and message
    client.logger.error(err.response.config) // includes request's config
  })
" tabindex="0" role="button">

</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><code>Server error</code></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>This is thrown when server returns <code>5XX</code>, it's an issue from server side.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Websocket</h2><a id="user-content-websocket" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Websocket" href="#websocket"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The WebSocket URLs for the available futures environments are as follows:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Testnet CM: wss://dstream.binancefuture.com</li>
<li>Testnet UM: wss://stream.binancefuture.com</li>
<li>Main CM: wss://dstream.binance.com</li>
<li>Main UM: wss://fstream.binance.com</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Websocket Streams</h3><a id="user-content-websocket-streams" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Websocket Streams" href="#websocket-streams"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">You can connect to the WebSocket stream using the UMStream Module (for USD-M Futures). Here is an example:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> UMStream <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">require</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"@binance/futures-connector"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">logger</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">Console</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-c1">stdout</span>: <span class="pl-s1">process</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">stdout</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">stderr</span>: <span class="pl-s1">process</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">stderr</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">// Define callbacks for different events</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">callbacks</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-en">open</span>: <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">debug</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"Connected with Websocket server"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-en">close</span>: <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">debug</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"Disconnected with Websocket server"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-en">message</span>: <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">logger</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">info</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">// Create a new WebSocket client with the wsURL (Websocket URL) defined</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">umWebsocketStreamClient</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">UMStream</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  logger<span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  callbacks<span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">wsURL</span>: <span class="pl-s">"wss://fstream.binance.com"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">// Subscribe to the allMarketMiniTickersStream stream</span>
<span class="pl-s1">umWebsocketStreamClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">allMarketMiniTickersStream</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"bnbusdt_perp"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">// Close the WebSocket stream after 6 seconds</span>
<span class="pl-en">setTimeout</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=></span> <span class="pl-s1">umWebsocketStreamClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">disconnect</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">6000</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="const { UMStream } = require("@binance/futures-connector");
const logger = new Console({ stdout: process.stdout, stderr: process.stderr });

// Define callbacks for different events
const callbacks = {
  open: () => logger.debug("Connected with Websocket server"),
  close: () => logger.debug("Disconnected with Websocket server"),
  message: (data) => logger.info(data),
};

// Create a new WebSocket client with the wsURL (Websocket URL) defined
const umWebsocketStreamClient = new UMStream({
  logger,
  callbacks,
  wsURL: "wss://fstream.binance.com",
});

// Subscribe to the allMarketMiniTickersStream stream
umWebsocketStreamClient.allMarketMiniTickersStream("bnbusdt_perp");

// Close the WebSocket stream after 6 seconds
setTimeout(() => umWebsocketStreamClient.disconnect(), 6000);" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Unsubscribe Websocket Stream</h3><a id="user-content-unsubscribe-websocket-stream" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Unsubscribe Websocket Stream" href="#unsubscribe-websocket-stream"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">You can unsubscribe from a WebSocket stream as follows:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-s1">umWebsocketStreamClient</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unsubscribe</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"bnbusdt_perp@kline_1m"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="umWebsocketStreamClient.unsubscribe("bnbusdt_perp@kline_1m");" tabindex="0" role="button">
